jsCode: (function() { function scrape() { try { const data = {}; const titles = document.querySelectorAll('h3'); titles.forEach(title => { const text = title.textContent.trim().toUpperCase(); const row = title.closest('tr'); if (!row) return; const val = row.querySelector("span.bgm:not([style*='display: none'])"); if (!val) return; const price = val.textContent.trim(); if (text.includes('24KT') && text.includes('GOLD')) { data.gold24 = price; } else if (text.includes('22KT')) { data.gold22 = price; } else if (text.includes('18KT')) { data.gold18 = price; } else if (text.includes('14KT')) { data.gold14 = price; } else if (text.includes('SILVER')) { data.silver999 = price; } }); if (Object.keys(data).length > 0) { window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage(JSON.stringify(data)); } } catch (e) {} } scrape(); setInterval(scrape, 3000); })(); true;
